description: Titles and keywords used by scripts/ecfr-hub-relevance.mjs for Hub-relevant CFR change detection via the public eCFR versioner API.

watchedTitles.note: Federal financial assistance; grants and data obligations often touch analytics programs.
Administrative personnel; common for governance and workforce analytics.
Commerce and foreign trade; NIST-adjacent regulatory context for standards and technology.
Environmental protection; frequent rulemaking with data and modeling obligations.
Emergency management; mission analytics and interagency data sharing.
Federal Acquisition Regulations System; IT acquisition and contractor data.
